tool_args: SELECT var_id, description, units FROM mesonet_variables WHERE var_id ILIKE '%soil%' OR var_id ILIKE '%SM%'
tool_result_summary: 28 soil-related variables found; SM_1_Avg (m³/m³) is primary soil VWC

tool_args: SELECT DISTINCT ON (station_id) station_id, value, timestamp FROM mesonet_measurements WHERE var_id='SM_1_Avg' ORDER BY station_id, timestamp DESC
tool_result_summary: 73 stations with soil moisture; values range from 0.062 (Haleakala Summit) to 0.741 (Kaala). One station (0122) reporting 7999 error code.

tool_args: CTE combining current_sm, week_ago_sm, recent_rain with flood risk classification
tool_result_summary: 25 stations ranked; windward Oahu most saturated (Kaala 74.1%), West Maui fastest rising (+19.8%/week). No HIGH risk stations currently.
